{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ninecloud Monarch
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Monarch]] is rainbow-shrouded.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
